member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.DeserializeNetworkToHost``1(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes a byte array into a specified struct type, handling network byte order (big-endian) conversion.

member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.SerializeInternal``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes a struct into a byte array. This is a generic helper used by SerializePacket.

member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.SerializePacket(System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes an sACN packet layer (Root, Framing, or DMP) into a byte array, ensuring correct network byte order (big-endian).
member.param: An instance of AcnRootLayer, AcnFramingLayer, or AcnDmpLayer.
member.returns: A byte array representing the serialized packet layer in network byte order.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided object is not a recognized sACN layer struct.

member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.GenerateNewCid
member.summary: Generates a new standard UUID (GUID) as a 16-byte array.

member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.ExtractFlagsAndLength(System.UInt16,System.Byte@,System.UInt16@)
member.summary: Extracts the Flags (high 4 bits) and Length (low 12 bits) from an sACN flength field.

member.name: M:sACN.SacnPacketHelper.CombineFlagsAndLength(System.Byte,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Combines Flags (high 4 bits) and Length (low 12 bits) into a single UInt16 flength field.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.DeserializeInternal``1(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes a byte array into a specified struct type, handling network byte order (big-endian) conversion.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.SerializeInternal``1(``0)
member.summary: Serializes a struct into a byte array. This is a generic helper used by SerializePacket.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.DeserializePacket(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Serializes an sACN packet layer (Root, Framing, or DMP) into a byte array, ensuring correct network byte order (big-endian).
member.param: An instance of AcnRootLayer, AcnFramingLayer, or AcnDmpLayer.
member.returns: A byte array representing the serialized packet layer in network byte order.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided object is not a recognized sACN layer struct.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.GenerateNewCid
member.summary: Generates a new standard UUID (GUID) as a 16-byte array.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.ExtractFlagsAndLength(System.UInt16,System.Byte@,System.UInt16@)
member.summary: Extracts the Flags (high 4 bits) and Length (low 12 bits) from an sACN flength field.

member.name: M:sACN.Utils.Serializers.CombineFlagsAndLength(System.Byte,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Combines Flags (high 4 bits) and Length (low 12 bits) into a single UInt16 flength field.
